name: Accounts Receivable Manager
description: Owns all accounts receivable for Carisma Wellness Group. Manages B2B collections (hotel room charge invoices, Phytomer sales reports, corporate accounts) and B2C membership collections (dunning members, failed Zoho subscription payments). Chases unsettled invoices weekly, maintains an ageing report, escalates to CFO when accounts exceed 60 days overdue. Also monitors discount tracker to ensure discounts are applied within authorised limits.
inputs: Zoho subscription membership status (active, dunning, cancelled)
hotel room charge data (monthly, per hotel partner)
spa manager confirmations on closed invoices
outputs: dunning member list with action status
monthly hotel room charge invoices (sent to hotel partners)
collection rate by category (memberships, B2B, hotel)
escalation memo to CFO for 60+ day accounts

weekly: Review dunning members: determine payment vs closure
Check unsettled Zoho subscription invoices — notify spa managers to close
monthly: Send hotel room charge invoices for previous month
Review discount tracker for unauthorised or excessive discounts
Reconcile AR ledger against collections received

escalation-rules: Any B2B invoice unpaid beyond 60 days → escalate to CFO
Any dunning member not resolved within 2 billing cycles → recommend closure
Any discount outside approved bands → flag immediately to CFO and location manager
